name: tax-calculator-ios
description: 个人所得税 — iOS App（Capacitor + PWA）

scripts.build:ios: npx cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -archivePath build/TaxApp.xcarchive archive && xcodebuild -exportArchive -archivePath build/TaxApp.xcarchive -exportPath build/ipa -exportOptionsPlist exportOptions.plist -allowProvisioningUpdates
